name: 14.5 fl oz Glass Nut Snack Bowl Pink - Threshold™
description:
Bring timeless style to your serveware with this Glass Nut Snack Bowl from Threshold™. This snack bowl is designed in a pink hue and features a beaded design on the rim to elevate the aesthetics of your tablescape. Made of glass, this 14.5-fluid-ounce bowl is ideal for serving nuts, sliced fruits and much more.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
